positive: A stylized, vibrant depiction of a celestial nebula meeting a forest of bioluminescent cherry blossoms. The composition should feature a central, symmetrical grouping of branching flora that organically blend into swirling galaxy dust and vibrant cosmic streams. Use a deep indigo and electric cyan color palette, contrasted sharply by pops of neon magenta and warm gold light emanating from the blossoms and stellar dust. Style: Highly detailed, modern digital art with clean vector-like silhouettes and glowing neon accents. Lighting: Dramatic subsurface scattering and hard rim lighting against a deep black void background. Composition: Perfect symmetry, perfect circle framing, designed for central placement on apparel.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, lowres, blur, artifact, smudge, disfigured, badly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, out of frame
